title: Mini-Tactics
tagline: Four pieces, one board, every tile a gamble.
description: A turn-based isometric squad-tactics duel on a fantasy war-table. Command a warrior, tank, ranger, and medic across a diamond battlefield: move, line up attacks, and brace for the dice. Play local hot-seat for 2–4 players (free-for-all or 2v2 teams), single-player vs CPU on three difficulties, or online 1v1.
status: Playable — local 2–4P hot-seat (FFA + teams), vs CPU, and online 1v1
